description: These tangy grapefruit citrus gummies taste like they came from a secret candy kitchen: slow-set, fruit-forward, and infused evenly for a smooth edible experience. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBG to support daytime focus and clarity, and CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect in a 1:1:1 ratio. Built for slow enjoyment: big flavor first, smooth cannabis finish after.
